description: capture the accessibility/element-ref snapshot of the current page (read-only)
rules: read-only — inspects the current page, mutates nothing
runs `playwright-cli snapshot` via the bundled npx wrapper
snapshot gives stable element refs (e3, e5, ...) for later interactions
degrades gracefully: records when a live browser is not requested/available
usage: Optional PW_SESSION isolates the browser session (must match the session you opened). Output: snapshot.json.
limitation: Needs npx + @playwright/cli + an already-open page to produce a real snapshot; offline it records the unreachable state and still emits valid output.
